2606.07512.title: MemDreamer: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Long Video Understanding via Hierarchical Graph Memory and Agentic Retrieval Mechanism
2606.07512.paper_summary: Current Vision-Language Models struggle with hours-long videos because processing full-length visual sequences induces prohibitive token explosion and attention dilution. To overcome this, we introduce MemDreamer to decouple perception and reasoning, shifting long-video understanding into an agentic exploration process. As a plug-and-play framework, it incrementally streams videos to construct a Hierarchical Graph Memory, a top-down three-tier architecture for semantic abstraction, anchored by a foundational graph capturing spatiotemporal and causal relations. During inference, the reasoning model employs agentic tool-augmented retrieval, navigating hierarchies, searching nodes, and traversing logical edges via an Observation-Reason-Action loop. Experiments show MemDreamer achieves SOTA results across four mainstream benchmarks, narrowing the gap with human experts to only 3.7 points. It constrains the reasoning context window to merely 2% of full-context ingestion while delivering a 12.5 point absolute accuracy gain. Furthermore, statistical analysis uncovers a strong positive linear correlation between an VLM's performance on logic reasoning and long-video understanding benchmarks, establishing agentic capability scaling as a new paradigm for multimodal comprehension.
2606.07512.paper_summary_zh: 目前的視覺-語言模型在處理長達數小時的視頻時面臨困難，因為處理完整的視覺序列會導致過多的標記爆炸和注意力稀釋。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了MemDreamer來解耦感知和推理，將長視頻理解轉變為一個主動探索的過程。作為一個即插即用的框架，它逐步流式傳輸視頻以構建層次圖記憶，這是一種自上而下的三層架構，用於語義抽象，並以捕捉時空和因果關係的基礎圖為基礎。在推理過程中，推理模型利用主動工具增強檢索，導航層次結構，搜索節點，並通過觀察-推理-行動循環穿越邏輯邊緣。實驗表明，MemDreamer在四個主流基準上達到了SOTA結果，將與人類專家的差距縮小至僅3.7分。它將推理上下文窗口限制為僅2%的完整上下文攝取，同時實現了12.5分的絕對準確性增益。此外，統計分析揭示了VLM在邏輯推理和長視頻理解基準上的表現之間存在強正線性相關，確立了主動能力擴展作為多模態理解的新範式。
2606.07512.author: Cong Chen et.al.
2606.07512.authors: Cong Chen, Guo Gan, Kaixiang Ji, ChaoYang Zhang, Zhen Yang, Guangming Yao, Hao Chen, Jingdong Chen, Yi Yuan, Chunhua Shen
